text: There is growing recognition of Hyperliquid's position as a leading protocol in crypto, especially in the areas of perpetual contracts, real-world asset markets (HIP-3), and prediction markets (HIP-4). The platform's token $HYPE is gaining attention for its potential reprice as market activity increases. Institutional capital and venture funding are flowing into HyperliquidX, which ranks among the top ecosystems by capital raised. The ecosystem is also expanding with new assets, integrations, and infrastructure improvements, including independent client implementations and data aggregation tools.
author: elfa_2041499222667641104

text: The Hyperliquid ecosystem is fostering a competitive and innovative environment for AI-driven autonomous trading agents. Senpi AI is developing a fleet of agents that dynamically adjust leverage based on signal strength, use maker-only execution to reduce fees, and employ new strategies like Spider v1.0 that enter trades based on convergence of top traders' signals. A $100,000 trading competition is ongoing to incentivize agent development and performance. The platform is also hiring engineers focused on architecting AI-driven systems for onchain trading at scale.
author: elfa_2041638768898187667

text: The Hyperliquid oil markets, particularly WTI and Brent crude oil perpetual contracts, are attracting significant trading activity and institutional interest. The markets have experienced extreme backwardation and negative funding rates, leading to complex arbitrage strategies involving shorting on Hyperliquid and longing CME futures. This has caused temporary market pauses and auto-deleveraging events to manage risk. Despite these challenges, the oil markets on Hyperliquid continue to set new open interest records and are considered among the most interesting and liquid markets in crypto.
author: elfa_2041659761347665987

text: HyperliquidX and its ecosystem are experiencing significant growth and innovation, with new features like intent-based perpetual trading UIs, AI autonomous trading agents, and expanded market offerings including equity perps (HIP-3) and prediction markets (HIP-4). The platform is seeing record open interest and volume, especially in real-world assets (RWAs) like oil and equities, and is attracting large institutional players and funds such as Abraxas Capital. The community is actively developing tools and infrastructure, including independent clients and data aggregators, to enhance transparency and trading efficiency.

text: FBI: US Crypto Scam Losses Hit $11.4B in 2025, Up 22%The FBI's 2025 Internet Crime Report shows US users lost $11.4 billion to cryptocurrency-related fraud in 2025, up 22% year over year, based on 181,565 crypto-asset complaints (+21%). Average loss per complaint was $62,604, and 18,589 complainants reported losses above $100,000. The FBI highlighted long-running cryptocurrency investment scams as a major risk, noting they are largely run by organized criminal enterprises based in Southeast Asia and often involve human-trafficking victims forced to operate scam centers. — link

text: Binance introduces the Spot Price Range Execution Rule to prevent tragedies like the one on October 10th from happening again. To prevent user orders from being executed at abnormal prices under extreme market conditions, starting on 2026-04-14, Binance is introducing a feature that allows order execution only within a dynamic price range. This mechanism restricts orders to execute only against liquidity priced within these ranges, preventing executions when prices deviate significantly due to abnormal activity. — link

text: Traditional Asset Trading Volume Surges on Binance Binance Research reports that over the past 90 days, the trading volume of its crypto-native RWA perpetual contracts relative to the average volume of traditional mainstream futures markets has risen from 0.2% to 4.9%. Specifically, silver contract trading volume peaked at 20.8% of COMEX, and gold peaked at 8.3%. The report states that if this trend continues, the distribution of pricing power between traditional and crypto markets could undergo significant changes. — link
